news.summary: Dublin - A report titled "Singapore Renewable Energy Policy Handbook 2025" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com’s offerings. The report covers essential details regarding the primary policies that control the renewable energy sector in Singapore. It also delves into regional and municipal renewable energy policies and advancements. The report addresses renewable energy goals and strategies, as well as the current policy structure, which provides insight into the potential growth of the renewable energy sector.
news.headline: Singapore Renewable Energy Policy Handbook 2025 report by ResearchAndMarkets provides comprehensive info on major policies in the country with regional/municipal developments, targets, and technology-specific incentives.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global poverty rate has decreased by 10% over the past decade, reaching a current rate of 8.6%. This means that around 700 million people have been lifted out of poverty. However, concerns were raised about the uneven distribution of this progress, as poverty reduction efforts have been more successful in some regions compared to others. Sub-Saharan Africa still has the highest poverty rate at 32%, with over 400 million people living in extreme poverty in this region. The report also highlighted the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on poverty levels, with an estimated 100 million more people expected to fall into extreme poverty in 2021. Efforts to address this issue are underway, but more targeted interventions are needed to ensure sustainable progress in reducing global poverty.
news.headline: India continues crash probe; flight recorder analysis ongoing—news source

news.summary: The global Aviation Safety Management Systems (SMS) market was valued at USD 3.5 billion in 2024 and is forecasted to reach USD 5.8 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 5.2% from 2025 to 2034. The market growth is driven by a focus on safety, regulatory compliance, and operational risk management in the aviation sector. Factors such as regulatory mandates, technological advancements like AI and cloud capabilities, and the increase in global air traffic are fueling the demand for advanced SMS frameworks. However, challenges include high costs, budget constraints for SMEs, and regulatory complexities. The market is segmented by component (software and services), application (commercial, military, general aviation), deployment mode (cloud-based, on-premises), end-users (airlines, airport authorities, MRO providers, regulators), organization size (SMEs, large enterprises), and region (North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, Latin America, Middle East, and Africa). Commercial aviation dominates the market, with the cloud-based deployment model gaining traction. North America leads the market, with Europe following closely behind.
news.headline: Global Aviation Safety Management Systems (SMS) market valued at USD 3.5 billion in 2024, to reach USD 5.8 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 5.2%. Increasing focus on safety and regulatory compliance in aviation driving market growth. Major drivers include regulatory mandates, integration of advanced technologies like AI and ML, and increase in global air traffic post-pandemic. Challenges include high costs, supply chain disruptions, and regulatory complexities. Software segment contributes 60-70% while services segment makes up 30-40% of the market. Commercial aviation dominates with military and general aviation segments contributing smaller shares. Cloud-based deployment gaining traction, especially among larger organizations, while on-premises deployment remains relevant for highly regulated environments. Key end-users include airlines, airports, MRO providers, and regulatory bodies. North America leads with 45% market share, followed by Europe with 30%.

news.summary: The global powertrain technologies market is undergoing a significant transformation as electric, hybrid, and hydrogen-powered systems redefine mobility. Valued at USD 478 billion in 2024, it is projected to reach USD 1.2 trillion by 2034 with a CAGR of 9.5%. Traditional internal combustion engines currently hold 55% of the market, projected to fall below 20% by 2034, while battery electric vehicles are expected to exceed 60%. Hybrid vehicles make up 8% of the market, and Fuel Cell Electric Vehicles could rise to over 6% by 2034. Electric powertrains lead the shift, with investments in EV infrastructure and incentives driving the transition. Companies like Tesla, Toyota, and Hyundai are innovating in electric and hybrid technologies. Fuel cell powertrains are advancing in markets with developing hydrogen infrastructure. Geographically, North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific are leading in EV adoption, with regions progressing at different paces toward electrification. Component giants and new entrants are reshaping the market with electric drive modules, software-defined platforms, and zero-emission technologies. The future of the powertrain technologies market is dynamic and transformative, emphasizing flexibility, innovation, and sustainability.
news.headline: Powertrain tech market valued at USD 478B in 2024, to reach USD 1.2T by 2034 at 9.5% CAGR, led by EV growth and gov support worldwide.
Israeli Ministry of Health: At least 271 people were hospitalized this morning after the Iranian strikes

news.summary: The automotive industry has witnessed a significant shift towards Electric Vehicles (EVs) and luxury vehicles, with a focus on sustainability, technology, and performance. The global BEV market is valued at approximately $375 billion in 2024, projected to exceed $1.2 trillion by 2034 with a CAGR of 12.5%. PHEV market is valued at $145 billion in 2024, expected to reach $330 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 8.6%. Asia-Pacific leads the EV market, with China alone accounting for 60% of global EV sales in 2024. The ultra-luxury car market is valued at $48 billion in 2024, projected to reach $97 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 7.3%. Performance luxury segment is worth $120 billion in 2024, growing to $245 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 7.5%. The electric luxury vehicle market is valued at $185 billion in 2024, projected to reach $530 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 11.1%. Expectations include increased autonomous capabilities, sustainable materials, and strategic partnerships in the industry as it moves towards integration and a blurred identity between mainstream and luxury vehicles.
news.headline: Electric and luxury vehicle market seen a transformation with $375B global BEV market in 2024, expected to exceed $1.2 trillion by 2034, $48B ultra-luxury car market in 2024, projected to reach $97B by 2034, $120B performance luxury segment in 2024, to grow to $245B by 2034, and $185B electric luxury vehicle market in 2024, predicted to reach $530B by 2034. Asia-Pacific leads in EV market with China alone accounting for 60% of global EV sales in 2024. Luxurious EVs redefine sustainability and connectivity. 2034 outlook reports growth driven by innovation, regulation and aspiration.

news.summary: The global aircraft safety check automation market is projected to grow from USD 1.2 billion in 2024 to around USD 2.5 billion by 2034, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.1%. This growth is attributed to the increasing demand for advanced safety measures and operational efficiency in the aviation sector, driven by technologies like artificial intelligence, machine learning, and the Internet of Things. Automated inspection systems hold 30% market share, while AI & ML solutions account for 25%. Airframe safety inspection systems lead the system type segment with a 35% share, and commercial aviation is the largest application segment holding 50% of total revenue. Airlines are the largest end-users at 40%, followed by MRO providers (30%), aircraft manufacturers (20%), and government/defense agencies (10%). Market dynamics like digital transformation, emphasis on eco-friendly aviation, and industry collaboration are driving innovation and shaping the future of aircraft safety inspection automation.
news.headline: Global Aircraft Safety Check Automation Market to double in value at USD 2.5 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 8.1%. Various technologies like AI, ML, IoT driving growth in aviation sector. Market segment analysis provided.

news.summary: The global pre-flight inspection tools market was valued at approximately USD 2.1 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 3.5 billion by 2034, growing at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.1%. The market growth is driven by a focus on aviation safety, technological innovations like augmented reality, IoT, AI, and inspection drones. The market faces challenges such as high initial investment costs and complex regulatory requirements. Major market segments include visual inspection tools, nondestructive testing tools, measurement tools, safety equipment, and inspection software. The market is segmented by application (commercial aviation, military aviation, cargo aviation, general aviation), end-users (airlines, MRO service providers, aircraft manufacturers, government agencies), technology, component, and deployment mode. North America leads the market, contributing 45% of global revenue in 2024, while the Asia-Pacific region is expected to be the fastest-growing market with a projected CAGR of 8% through 2034.
news.headline: Global pre-flight inspection tools market valued at USD 2.1B in 2024, expected to reach USD 3.5B by 2034. Key drivers include aviation safety, technological innovations like AR, IoT, AI, and drones. Main challenges are high investment costs and regulatory complexities. North America leads with 45% of market share, while Asia-Pacific is the fastest-growing region with a projected CAGR of 8% through 2034.

news.summary: Nomad Temporary Housing has once again secured the top spot in the Trippel Survey, marking their 14th consecutive #1 ranking. The company, based in San Diego, achieved a perfect 100% net satisfaction score, the highest among all U.S. domestic temporary housing providers in the latest 2025 Nationwide survey. This recognition underscores Nomad's commitment to excellence in the industry.
news.headline: Nomad Temporary Housing ranked #1 among U.S. temporary housing providers in 2025, with 100% net satisfaction.

news.summary: Randolph, N.J., June 19, 2025 - Toll Brothers, Inc., a prominent luxury home builder (NYSE:TOL), unveiled its latest model home at Oaks at Randolph in Randolph, New Jersey. This upscale community offers luxurious townhomes and various resort-style facilities. The model home, located at 3 Flower Horn Blvd., is open for tours daily. Toll Brothers is recognized as the top builder of luxury homes in the U.S., with their newest addition showcasing their commitment to upscale living in Randolph.
news.headline: Toll Brothers opens new model home in Randolph, NJ with upscale townhomes and resort-style amenities. Model home at 3 Flower Horn Blvd now open daily for tours.

news.summary: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has reached 4.5%, with an estimated 10 million people currently out of work. This is a slight increase from the previous month, where the rate was at 4.3%. Additionally, the inflation rate has also risen to 2.5%, driven by higher food and fuel prices. The government has announced plans to implement new policies to address these economic challenges and spur growth in the coming months.Experts predict that the economy is expected to recover slowly over the next year, with projections indicating a 2% GDP growth. The central bank has been urged to consider adjusting interest rates to stimulate spending and investment. In response to these developments, businesses are advised to strategize and adapt to the changing market conditions to remain competitive in the evolving economic landscape.
news.headline: Market turbulence expected as $6.5 trillion 'triple witching' event signals return to volatility.

news.summary: In Toronto, Dream Office REIT (TSX: D.UN) declared a monthly distribution of 8.333 cents ($1.00 annualized) per REIT Unit, Series A for June 2025. The distribution, payable on July 15, 2025, is for unitholders recorded as of June 30, 2025. A leading office landlord in downtown Toronto, Dream Office REIT is an unincorporated real estate investment trust with a portfolio encompassing over 3.5 million square feet.
news.headline: Dream Office REIT declares June 2025 distribution of 8.333 cents per REIT Unit (annualized $1), payable on July 15, 2025.

news.summary: Dream Industrial REIT disclosed its monthly distribution for June 2025 with a payout of 5.833 cents per Unit (equivalent to 70 cents annually), payable on July 15, 2025, to shareholders holding units as of June 30, 2025. Dream Industrial REIT, traded as DIR.UN on the TSX, is a prominent owner and operator of diverse industrial properties worldwide. As of March 31, 2025, the Trust holds and oversees a substantial interest in a global portfolio.
news.headline: Dream Industrial REIT (TSX: DIR.UN) declares June 2025 distribution of 5.833 cents per unit (70 cents yearly), payable on July 15th to shareholders of record on June 30th. Global portfolio includes industrial properties.

news.summary: Dream Residential Real Estate Investment Trust (Ticker Symbols: DRR.U and DRR.UN) disclosed its monthly distribution for June 2025, amounting to US$0.035 per unit (US$0.42 annually). news.headline: Dream Residential REIT declared June 2025 distribution of US$0.035 per unit (US$0.42 annualized), payable on July 15th.

news.summary: Emeryville, California - In a recent announcement dated June 19, 2025, MT Sobek, a renowned figure in the adventure travel industry dating back to 1969, revealed Seth Heald as its incoming Chief Executive Officer. Heald, a highly experienced leader boasting more than twenty years of expertise in entrepreneurship and operations, is set to take the helm at the company. This transition marks a significant shift in the leadership at MT Sobek, signaling a new era under Heald's guidance.
news.headline: MT Sobek appoints Seth Heald as CEO, bringing over 20 years of experience to lead adventure travel expansion.

news.summary: A new Artisan Bakery has been established in Chicago through the acquisitions of Snackwerks and Specialty Bakers by HCPI. This new platform will provide high-quality baked goods and co-manufacturing services. The move is aimed at enhancing HCPI's presence in the bakery industry and expanding its offerings to consumers.
news.headline: HC Private Investments forms Artisan Bakery by acquiring Snackwerks and Specialty Bakers in Chicago to offer premium baked goods and co-manufacturing services in the bakery industry.

news.summary: The global market for Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) is rapidly growing, with a projected increase from USD 42.5 billion in 2024 to approximately USD 133.8 billion by 2034, at a CAGR of 12.2%. One key component of ADAS is the Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) segment, which is estimated to be worth USD 8.1 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow to USD 24.9 billion by 2034, at a CAGR of 11.9%. Similarly, the Lane Departure Warning System (LDWS) market is forecasted to hit USD 13.7 billion by 2034, registering a CAGR of 12.3%. The Parking Assistance Systems segment is also experiencing rapid adoption, growing from USD 6.9 billion in 2024 to USD 21.4 billion by 2034, at a CAGR of 12.1%. Companies like Bosch, Valeo, Denso, Continental, Magna, ZF Friedrichshafen, and Hyundai Mobis are leading the way in innovation within the ADAS market. The integration of these ADAS systems is enabling the shift towards semi-autonomous vehicles, with advancements in AI processing, V2X communication, and regional dynamics influencing the market. Key market segmentation includes system type, component, vehicle type, level of automation, and region. North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific are identified as key regions driving the growth of the ADAS market.
news.headline: By 2034, ADAS market is expected to reach USD 133.8 billion, which grew from USD 42.5 billion in 2024 at a CAGR of 12.2%. ACC valued at USD 8.1 billion likely to grow to USD 24.9 billion by 2034 at a CAGR of 11.9%. LDWS valued at USD 4.3 billion in 2024 forecasted to hit USD 13.7 billion by 2034, registering a CAGR of 12.3%. Parking Assistance Systems growing from USD 6.9 billion in 2024 to USD 21.4 billion by 2034 at a CAGR of 12.1%.

news.summary: The global market for Vehicle Safety Compliance Platforms is set to grow from around USD 1.8 billion in 2024 to nearly USD 3.5 billion by 2034, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.9%. This growth is fueled by increasing emphasis on road safety and regulatory adherence, with advancements in technologies like AI and machine learning driving market evolution. Key trends include AI integration, expanding electric vehicle (EV) sector, consumer awareness, and investments in automated safety technologies. Market segments include Compliance Management Software (30%), Fleet Management Solutions (25%), Reporting and Analytics Tools (15%), and Training and Certification Platforms (10%). Cloud-based deployment models hold 50% market share, catering to scalability and affordability, while on-premises solutions serve about 20% market with greater data control. End users include Automotive Manufacturers (35%), Fleet Operators (25%), Insurance Companies (15%), and Regulatory Agencies (5%). Applications span Vehicle Inspection and Maintenance (30%), Driver Safety Management (20%), Risk Assessment and Management (15%), and Incident Reporting and Analysis (10%). Regional markets span North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, Latin America, and Middle East & Africa. The market landscape is driven by a focus on safety compliance, technological advancements, and increasing regulatory standards.
news.headline: Global Vehicle Safety Compliance Platforms market projected to grow from USD 1.8B in 2024 to nearly USD 3.5B by 2034, with a CAGR of 6.9%. Key drivers include AI integration, EV expansion, and increasing consumer awareness. Compliance Management Software segment holds 30% market share, Fleet Management Solutions 25%, Reporting and Analytics Tools 15%, and Training and Certification Platforms 10%. Cloud-based deployment model accounts for 50% of adoption. Automotive Manufacturers account for 35%, Fleet Operators 25%, Insurance Companies 15%, and Regulatory Agencies 5% of the market.

news.summary: The St. Petersburg annual economic forum, which historically resulted in multi-billion dollar deals and showcased performances by international music celebrities, has been impacted by the ongoing conflict in Ukraine. The event's usual atmosphere has changed significantly due to the war, leading to a different ambiance at the forum this year.
news.headline: Russian expo loses glitz without rock stars and luxury cars amid rising tensions, downgrading from billion-dollar deals to somber tones.

news.summary: The Connected Vehicle AI Solutions market, valued at USD 8.4 billion in 2024, is projected to reach USD 27 billion by 2034, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of about 13% from 2025 to 2034. The growth is driven by AI-integrated mobility technologies such as Machine Learning, Computer Vision, and Natural Language Processing. AI adoption in smart transportation systems is accelerating due to real-time communication and automation becoming standard. Key drivers include urbanization, safety features, and the shift towards electric vehicles. Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, and Computer Vision are significant segments of this market. AI is transforming autonomous driving, traffic management, predictive maintenance, and driver assistance systems. The market is segmented by technology type, application, connectivity, vehicle type, end-users, and regions. Challenges include data privacy and cybersecurity risks due to extensive data collection in connected vehicles. The market potential is vast with widespread applications of AI in enhancing the safety and efficiency of connected transportation systems.
news.headline: By 2034, the Connected Vehicle AI Solutions market is projected to reach over USD 27 billion, with a CAGR of 13%. Key drivers include technology advancements, urbanization, and safety concerns. Machine Learning, NLP, and Computer Vision are key technologies enhancing vehicle operations. Segments driving growth are autonomous driving, traffic management, predictive maintenance, and driver assistance systems. Major challenges include data privacy and cybersecurity risks.

news.summary: The SUV market has witnessed significant transformations over the years, appealing to a wide range of consumers ranging from adventurers to eco-conscious buyers. The compact SUV market, valued at $400 billion in 2024, is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6.7% to reach $765 billion by 2034. Key players in this segment include Toyota, Honda, and Hyundai. The full-size SUV market, worth $280 billion in 2024, is forecasted to hit $510 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 6.3%. Top players here are General Motors, Ford, and Toyota. The off-road SUV market, valued at $85 billion in 2024, is expected to reach $160 billion by 2034, with key players being Jeep, Land Rover, and Toyota. The crossover market, valued at $550 billion in 2024, is anticipated to exceed $1 trillion by 2034 with prominent players like Toyota, Honda, and Hyundai. The subcompact crossover market, worth $110 billion in 2024, is projected to grow to $215 billion by 2034, with key players including Hyundai, Kia, and Nissan. The luxury crossover market, estimated at $130 billion in 2024, is expected to reach $265 billion by 2034, with top manufacturers being BMW, Mercedes-Benz, and Audi. The overall growth trends suggest a promising future for the SUV market across various segments.
news.headline: SUV market evolving with specialized segments - $400B compact, $280B full-size, $85B off-road, $550B crossover, $110B subcompact - key players & trends.

news.summary: A report on the global cannabis cultivation market has been released, forecasting substantial growth in the industry. The market is expected to reach a value of USD 651.8 billion by 2034, up from USD 180.7 billion in 2025, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 15.3%. This growth is attributed to the increasing legalization of medical and recreational cannabis worldwide. The report provides insights into market trends, analysis, and forecasts for the period 2025-2034, offering a comprehensive view of the industry's opportunities and challenges.
news.headline: Global cannabis cultivation market expected to reach USD 651.8 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 15.3% from USD 180.7 billion in 2025.

news.summary: Kroger (NYSE: KR) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on June 20, 2025, with analysts expecting an EPS of $1.46. Investors are eagerly anticipating positive news that could potentially surpass these estimates and provide optimistic guidance for the next quarter. In the last quarter, Kroger exceeded EPS expectations by $0.03, leading to a 4.58% increase in share price the following day. As of June 17, Kroger shares were trading at $65.95, showing a 30.49% increase over the past 52 weeks. Analysts have given Kroger an Outperform rating with an average one-year price target of $74.8, indicating a potential 13.42% upside. Staying informed about industry sentiments and expectations is crucial for investors.
news.headline: Kroger (KR) earnings preview: EPS of $1.46 expected on 2025-06-20. Share price at $65.95, 52-week return of 30.49%. Analysts rate Outperform with $74.8 target.

news.summary: Accenture is set to announce its quarterly earnings on June 20, with analysts expecting an EPS of $3.32. Investors are eager to see if the company surpasses estimates and provides positive guidance for the next quarter, as market reactions are often influenced by such announcements. In the previous quarter, Accenture beat EPS by $0.01, leading to a 1.47% increase in share price the next day. Over the past four quarters, the company's performance and resulting price changes varied. Accenture's stock was trading at $312.03 on June 17, with a 52-week decline of 0.84%, disappointing long-term shareholders. news.summary: Helm.ai, based in Redwood City, California, unveiled their latest product, Helm.ai Vision, a cutting-edge urban perception system tailored for Level 2+ and Level 3 autonomous driving in mainstream vehicles. This innovative system offers precise, dependable, and extensive perception capabilities, marking a substantial step forward in the realm of autonomous driving technology. The solution has been evaluated by UL Solutions, providing automakers with a scalable and affordable option for urban driving implementations.
news.headline: Helm.ai unveils Helm.ai Vision for Level 2+ and 3 autonomous driving, providing accurate and reliable urban perception system.

news.summary: Darden Restaurants (NYSE: DRI) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on June 20, 2025. Analysts predict the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $2.96. news.summary: In Bridgewater, N.J., iconectiv shared news that Sarah Halko, the company's Director of Regulatory and Industry Relations, has been named co-chair of the ATIS SMS/800 Number Administration Committee (SNAC). This new role will see her spearheading key initiatives aimed at enhancing consumer confidence in toll-free voice and messaging services. Halko's appointment is for a two-year period, starting from May 2025 and concluding in May 2027. Previously, this position was held by a senior executive at iconectiv.
news.headline: Sarah Halko appointed Co-Chair of ATIS SNAC, leading initiatives to restore consumer trust in toll-free comms. Term: May 2025 to May 2027.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that there has been a surge in COVID-19 cases in the city, with a total of 1,200 new cases recorded in the past week alone. This represents a significant increase compared to the previous month, with the majority of new cases being attributed to the Delta variant. Hospital admissions have also risen, with 150 new patients admitted in the last week, putting strain on healthcare facilities. Officials have urged the public to adhere to safety protocols and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, there has been a noticeable rise in the number of deaths related to COVID-19, with 20 new fatalities reported in the same period. The situation is being closely monitored, and authorities are considering implementing stricter measures to contain the outbreak.

news.summary: The increase in skin cancer cases has been a key factor driving market growth, with a significant rise in incidence rates. Technological advancements in optical imaging have also played a pivotal role in boosting the market. The expansion of teledermatology services has further contributed to the growth, enabling remote diagnosis and treatment. There is a growing focus on early detection, which has propelled the demand for dermoscopy and skin visualization technologies. These trends are reflected in a recent market research report titled 'Dermoscopy and Skin Visualization,' highlighting the importance of these developments. The report, based on data from June 19, 2025, has shed light on the increasing market size and opportunities in this sector, with Redding, Calif., serving as a notable hub for these advancements.
news.headline: Market for dermoscopy and skin visualization devices expected to grow to $3.3 billion by 2035 at a CAGR of 8.7%.

news.summary: Located in Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report suggests that the worldwide market for UQD couplings is currently worth $0.39 billion in 2025. Projections indicate that this market is anticipated to increase to $0.75 billion by 2030. The report forecasts a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 14.3% during the period from 2025 to 2030.
news.headline: UQD coupling market valued at $0.39 billion in 2025, projected to reach $0.75 billion by 2030, with 14.3% CAGR growth.

news.summary: Chen Moore and Associates (CMA), a Florida-based engineering, landscape architecture, and planning firm, has recently been honored nationally for its impressive growth, innovative practices, and commitment to community. The firm, headquartered in Fort Lauderdale, achieved this recognition on June 19, 2025. CMA's accomplishments have earned it a spot on the prestigious Engineering News-Record list.
news.headline: Chen Moore & Associates named to 2025 ENR 500 list for growth, innovation. Leading engineering firm in planning, architecture.

news.summary: The realm of crypto crime extends beyond high-profile cases involving exchanges like FTX and fraudulent schemes. Jennie Levin sheds light on the complex and technical challenges confronting the blockchain industry at present. She delves into the reasons why regulators are struggling to keep pace with this evolving landscape, where various threats lurk.
news.headline: Learn about the hidden dangers of crypto crime. Jennie Levin explains advanced threats in blockchain. Regulators are lagging behind.

news.summary: On the occasion of Juneteenth holiday, Bitcoin is currently exhibiting a lack of excitement. However, experts in the market are anticipating a return to volatility in BTC pricing shortly.
news.headline: Bitcoin analysts anticipate increased price volatility after the Juneteenth holiday, with experts expecting significant fluctuations in BTC value.
